parsed_output.justification: Based on the transcript, Mike repeatedly claims to be a troublemaker and denied being a werewolf, yet most of the conversation suggests that he’s the only one who consistently deflects blame and implies involvement in swapping others’ cards. His statements that “He was a werewolf” conflicting with his own denial misleads other players and hints that Mike may originally have been a werewolf who swapped to a village role, making him the most probable werewolf. Eliminating Mike therefore increases the chance that a werewolf dies and helps the Village win.
